slurm.sacct_note: sacct returned no record in this environment; log timestamps show GPU prediction completed successfully.

interpretation.schema_validation: Boltz-2 produced PDB + confidence + PAE + pLDDT + PDE files; this is sufficient for Stage04 predictor adapter parsing.
interpretation.biological_quality: The tiny smoke input has no MSA and arbitrary short chains, so low ipTM is expected and not used as a biological success criterion.

resolved_errors.fix: download mols.tar, boltz2_conf.ckpt, boltz2_aff.ckpt from hf-mirror into /data/kfliao/general_model/boltz_cache and extract mols.tar

resolved_errors.error: sbatch rejected uploaded script: DOS line breaks
